name: golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev
title: golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev
summary: capture, manipulate, and format call stacks
description:
capture, manipulate, and format call stacks
Package stack implements utilities to capture, manipulate,
and format call stacks. It provides a simpler API than
package runtime.
.
The implementation takes care of the minutia and special
cases of interpreting the program counter (pc) values
returned by runtime.Callers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev because capture, manipulate, and format call stacks.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-go-stack-stack-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
